name: shotapi
description: Screenshot & Render API for AI Agents. MCP Server lets Claude, Cursor capture webpages and render HTML. Direct access, no VPN needed.

tools.name: screenshot_one_liner
tools.description: Capture a webpage as a JPEG screenshot. The simplest way to see what a webpage looks like. Returns a 1280x720 JPEG image with ads blocked.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture a webpage screenshot with full control over viewport, format, and element selection.

tools.name: render
tools.description: Render HTML/CSS code as an image. Turn any markup into a visual preview. Auto-cropped to content.
